_comment: Adapter-creekd deploy-test exclusions. Merged with Next.js's canonical test/deploy-tests-manifest.json via NEXT_EXTERNAL_TESTS_FILTERS. expire-time is upstream-marked with it.failing for a Vercel Proxy limitation; adapter-creekd already satisfies the intended behavior, so running the single-test file in deploy mode makes the failing marker fail. The segment-cache fallback-param cases are skipped in current Next.js canary but still present in the pinned CI ref.

flakey: cached navigations defers fallback params to the runtime stage
cached navigations reuses cached page segment across different fallback params after navigation
